title: Create: Unbrekable Netherite Hoe
description: Create: Unbrekable Netherite Hoe adds a new tool to the game which is unbreakable as the name says, the hoe works like normal hoe, but it's unbrekable
body:
![Icon of the mod](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d48144db1692457a784dd6c24c9b4412196dcbd5.png)
# Create: Unbreakable Netherite Hoe
This mod simply adds a new unbreakable netherite hoe to the game which is unbreakable as the name says, the hoe works like normal hoe but it's unbreakable, also the recipe is create mod styled:
![The actual recipe for it](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0e99d127b2575055654c754f16de5970cbe5be4a.png)

**Curseforge Version:** [Link (Click me)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/create-unbrekable-netherite-hoe)
